'''√j-k-v''' ('''kajakav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:larn|larn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:larn|larn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-k-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajakav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijakav || jijakav || shijakav || kijakav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujakav || jujujakav || shushujakav || kukujakav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujakav || jujakav || shujakav || kujakav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujakav || jujakav || shujakav || kujakav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejakav || jejakav || shejakav || kejakav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojakav || jojojakav || shoshojakav || kokojakav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojakav || jojakav || shojakav || kojakav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojakav || jojakav || shojakav || kojakav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jakav || jakav || jakav || jakav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jakav || jakav || jakav || jakav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jakav || jakav || jakav || jakav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jakav || jakav || jakav || jakav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjakav || jæjakav || shæjakav || kæjakav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajakav || jajajakav || shashajakav || kakajakav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajakav || jajakav || shajakav || kajakav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajakav || jajakav || shajakav || kajakav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajakav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajakav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajakav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajakavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajakavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajakavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajakavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajakavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajakavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajakavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajakavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajakavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajakavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajakavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajakavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajakavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajakavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajakavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajakavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajakavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajakavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajakavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajakavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajakavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajakavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajakavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajakavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajakavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajakavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajakavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajakavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajakavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajakavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajakavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajakavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajakavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajakavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajakavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajakavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajakavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajakavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajakavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajakavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajakavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajakavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajakavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajakavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajakavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajakavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajakavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajakavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajakavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajakavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajakavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajakavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajakavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajakavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajakavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajakavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajakavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajakavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajakavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajakavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
